title: Minkarhi yo Cinca: 1960, 1976 na 1990
subject: History
caps_topic: Turning points in South African history: 1960, 1976 and 1990

slides.title: Minkarhi yo Cinca: 1960, 1976 na 1990
slides.lead: Malembe manharhu lawa ma cinceke Afrika Dzonga - Sharpeville, ku pfukela ka Soweto, na ku ntshunxiwa ka Mandela endleleni yo ya eku fumeni ka vanhu.

media.alt: Swikombiso swinharhu swa nkoka endleleni leyi tlhandlukaka, xin'wana ni xin'wana xi funengetiwe hi lembe, swi kongoma exivandleni xa ku vonaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='262' cy='44' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 170 Q120 150 200 110 T320 60 L320 180 L0 180 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='60' y='128' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='250' y='64' width='6' height='24'/></g><g fill='#2f5233' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' font-weight='bold'><text x='46' y='124'>1960</text><text x='146' y='92'>1976</text><text x='236' y='60'>1990</text></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sungula hi ku hlamusela leswaku 'nkarhi wo cinca' i yini - i nkarhi lowu cincaka ndlela ya matimu. Nyika xikombiso xa minkarhi yinharhu yo cinca ya yunithi leyi: Sharpeville (1960), ku pfukela ka Soweto (1976) na ku susiwa ka ku yirisiwa ka mintlawa ya ntshunxeko na ku ntshunxiwa ka Mandela (1990). Vutisa swichudeni leswi va se swi tivaka hi lembe rin'wana ni rin'wana.

slides.title: Afrika Dzonga hi 1960
slides.lead: Hi 1960 milawu ya apartheid a yi lawula hlengeletanyana ya vutomi bya Vanhu vantima va Afrika Dzonga - naswona ku kaneta a ku kula.

blocks.text: Hi va-1950 mfumo wa National Party a wu vekile apartheid ku va nawu. **Milawu ya phasi (pass laws)** a yi ri exikarhi ka leyi vengiwaka ngopfu: yi sindzise vanhu va Xintima ku rhwala buku ya phasi minkarhi hinkwayo, yi lawula laha va nga tshamaka, va tirha ni ku famba kona.

items: **African National Congress (ANC)** yi rhangele ku kaneta hi tikhampeyini to fana na Defiance Campaign ya 1952.
Hi 1959 **Pan Africanist Congress (PAC)**, leyi rhangeriweke hi Robert Sobukwe, yi hambanile na ANC.
Mintlawa hayimbirhi yi kunguhate mikhuva yo kaneta milawu ya phasi eku sunguleni ka 1960.

slides.notes: Tlhelela eka yunithi leyi hundzeke (1948 na va-1950). Kandziyisa leswaku milawu ya phasi hi yona ntsandza-vukulu wa leswi landzelaka. Hlamusela ku avana: PAC a yi pfumela eka maendlelo ya Vuafrika naswona a yi lava ku rhangela khampeyini ya yona yo lwisana na phasi, hi ku hambana na mkhuva lowu ANC a yi wu kunguhatile. Vusandzeli lebyi byi pfuna ku hlamusela leswaku ha yini Sharpeville yi humelele hi nkarhi lowu yi humeleke ha wona.

slides.eyebrow: Nkarhi wo cinca wo sungula - 21 Nyenyankulu 1960
slides.title: Ku dlaya ka Sharpeville
slides.lead: Maphorisa ma pfule ku hlaselisa mkhuva wo rhula wo lwisana na phasi, ma dlaya vanhu va 69.

blocks.text: Hi 21 Nyenyankulu 1960 PAC yi vitanile vanhu ku siya tibuku ta vona ta phasi ekaya kutani va hlengeletana hi ku rhula etitanhweni ta maphorisa, va tinyiketela ku khomiwa. Le **Sharpeville**, township exifundzeni xa Vaal edzongeni wa Johannesburg, ntshungu lowukulu wu hlengeletanile ehandle ka xitanhwa xa maphorisa.

items: Handle ko tsundzuxa hi ku olova, maphorisa ma pfule ku hlaselisa ntshungu lowu a wu nga khomanga matlhari.
**Vanhu va 69 va dlayiwile** naswona kwalomu ka 180 va vaviseka; vo tala va hlaseriwe enhlaneni loko va tsutsuma.
Mkhuva lowu fanaka le Langa ekusuhi na Kapa na wona wu herile hi madzolonga ya maphorisa.

media.alt: Ntshungu wa vanhu lava hangalakaka va suka eka movha wa maphorisa, na 69 yi funengetiwe tanihi nhlayo yo tika.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='240' height='32' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='16' y='96' width='48' height='30' rx='4' fill='#3a3a3a'/><rect x='22' y='86' width='20' height='12' fill='#5c5c5c'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='120' cy='70' r='9'/><circle cx='150' cy='64' r='9'/><circle cx='180' cy='72' r='9'/><circle cx='205' cy='62' r='9'/><rect x='114' y='82' width='12' height='30'/><rect x='144' y='76' width='12' height='34'/><rect x='174' y='84' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='199' y='74' width='12' height='36'/></g><text x='96' y='40' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' font-weight='bold' fill='#5c1414'>69</text></svg>

slides.notes: Khoma mhaka leyi hi vutlhari - i xiendlakalo lexi vavisaka. Ku landzelelana ka kahle ku na ku kanetana, kambe SAHO yi tsala 69 va dlayiwile na kwalomu ka 180 va vaviseka, vo tala va hlaseriwe enhlaneni. [SME] Tinhlayo ta ku fa ni ku vaviseka ti hambana katsongo exikarhi ka tihuvo; tiyisisa tinhlayo leti u lavaka swichudeni swi ti tsala. Kandziyisa leswaku mkhuva a wu ri wo rhula naswona vanhu a va nga khomanga matlhari. Hi nkarhi lowu madzolonga ya apartheid ma kombisiweke emisaveni hinkwayo.

slides.title: Xiyimo xa xihatla-hatla na ku yirisiwa ka ANC na PAC
slides.lead: Mfumo wu tirhise matimba yo tika naswona wu endla mintlawa mikulu ya ntshunxeko yi va ya vona nawu.

blocks.text: Sharpeville yi vange mikhuva etikweni hinkwaro na ku chava emisaveni hinkwayo. Mfumo wu tivise **xiyimo xa xihatla-hatla (state of emergency)**, wu khoma vanhu va madzana yo tala va matimba, kutani wu hatlisa nawu lowuntshwa hi le palamende.

items: **Unlawful Organisations Act (1960)** wu tirhisiwile ku yirisa ANC na PAC hayimbirhi hi Dzivamisoko 1960.
Varhangeri va khomiwile, naswona vo tala va nghene ehansi ka misava kumbe va suka etikweni.
Mkhuva wo rhula, lowu nga eka nawu, sweswi a wu nga ha koteki - nkarhi lowukulu wo cinca eku lweleni.

media.alt: Xitsalwana xa ximfumo lexi khandiyisiweke hi 'BANNED' hi liya-mubvala ehenhla ka maletere ya ANC na PAC.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='24' width='100' height='120' rx='4' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='62' y='40' width='76' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='62' y='54' width='76' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='62' y='68' width='56' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='62' y='108' width='76' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='62' y='122' width='50' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/><g transform='rotate(-14 100 88)'><rect x='44' y='74' width='112' height='30' rx='4' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><text x='58' y='96' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#8a1f1f'>BANNED</text></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela nkoka hi ku olova: ku yirisiwa a swi vula leswaku ANC na PAC a swi nga ha koti ku tirha erivaleni, ku kandziyisa, ku va ni minhlangano kumbe ku tsarisa swirho hi ku pfumeleriwa hi nawu. Ku pfaleka loku ka tindlela to rhula ku sindzise mintlawa ku ya eka maqhinga mantshwa, leswi nga nkongomelo wa xikirini lexi landzelaka. Xiya leswaku xiyimo xa xihatla-hatla xi nyike maphorisa matimba layo anama yo khoma vanhu handle ko tengisiwa.

slides.eyebrow: Ku cinca ka maqhinga - ku sukela 1961
slides.title: Ku suka eka mkhuva wo ya eku lweni hi matlhari
slides.lead: Loko mkhuva wo rhula wu yirisiwile, mintlawa yi cince maendlelo ya yona.

blocks.heading: Ehansi ka misava
blocks.text: Mintlawa leyi yirisiweke yi hambete yi tirha hi xihundla naswona yi simeka tibindzu ehandle ka tiko.

blocks.heading: Timpiko ta matlhari
blocks.text: ANC yi vumbe Umkhonto we Sizwe (MK) hi 1961; PAC yi vumbe Poqo.

blocks.heading: Ntengiso wa Rivonia
blocks.text: Hi 1964 Nelson Mandela na van'wana va gweviwile khotso ya vutomi hinkwabyo.

slides.notes: Hlayisa leswi eka ntokoto wa Grade 9: endzhaku ka Sharpeville na ku yirisiwa, va-aktivisi vo tala va fikelele eka xiboho xa leswaku mkhuva wo rhula wu ri woxe a wu nga ha koti ku tirha, kutani va hundzulukela eka ku onha ni ku kaneta hi matlhari. MK (leswi vulaka 'Fumu ra Tiko') yi vumbiwile hi Nhlangula 1961. Eka Ntengiso wa Rivonia (1963-64) Mandela na van'wana va nkombo va gweviwile khotso ya vutomi hinkwabyo. Leswi swi sungula malembe ya 27 ya Mandela ekhotsweni, lawa ma hlanganisaka na 1990.

slides.title: Bantu Education na xileriso xa Xibunu
slides.lead: Vukarhi hi dyondzo yo tsongahatiwa ni yo lawuriwa byi tluvuka etikolo.

blocks.text: **Bantu Education Act (1953)** wu nyike vana va Xintima dyondzo yo tsongahatiwa hi vomu leyi a yi kunguhatiwe ku va letela ntsena eku tirheni ka mintirho. Hi va-1970 tikolo a ti tele ngopfu naswona a ti nga ni mali yo ringana, kutani nhlangano lowuntshwa, **Black Consciousness**, lowu rhangeriweke hi Steve Biko, wu khutaze vantshwa ku titwa va ri va nkoka na ku kaneta.

items: Hi 1974 mfumo wu lerise leswaku **Xibunu (Afrikaans)** xi tirhisiwa ku dyondzisa hafu ya swidyondzo swa xikolo.
Swichudeni swi vone Xibunu tanihi ririmi ra vaxanisi va vona naswona a swi nga koti ku dyondza kahle hi xona.
Vukarhi byi tlakuke etikolo ta Soweto hi ku famba ka lembe ra 1976.

media.alt: Buku leyi pfulekeke ekusuhi na miako mimbirhi ya xikolo leyi nga ringaniki, wun'wana wukulu wun'wana wutsongo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M24 62 q40 -16 78 0 v58 q-38 -14 -78 0 Z' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M106 62 q40 -16 78 0 v58 q-40 -14 -78 0 Z' fill='#3f6b45'/><line x1='104' y1='60' x2='104' y2='122' stroke='#1f3a24' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='150' y='84' width='40' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M148 84 L170 66 L192 84 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='196' y='104' width='16' height='20' fill='#b7a98d'/></svg>

slides.notes: Xikirini lexi i xihlanganiso ku suka eka nkarhi wo cinca wo sungula ku ya eka wa vumbirhi. Endla swivangelo swi twala: (1) ku vilela ka nkarhi wo leha hi Bantu Education, (2) Afrikaans Medium Decree ya 1974 tanihi ntsandza-vukulu wo hatlisa, na (3) Black Consciousness leyi nyike swichudeni ku tiyimisela ku endla. Hlamusela leswaku ha yini ku sindzisa Xibunu a swi vengiwa ngopfu - swichudeni swo tala na vadyondzisi vo tala a va nga xi tivi kahle.

slides.eyebrow: Nkarhi wo cinca wa vumbirhi - 16 Khotavuxika 1976
slides.title: Ku pfukela ka Soweto
slides.lead: Magidi ya vana va xikolo va fambe hi mkhuva - kutani va hlangana na tikwembe ta maphorisa.

blocks.text: Hi nimixo wa **16 Khotavuxika 1976**, magidi ya swichudeni swa Soweto swi fambe hi ku rhula ku kaneta ku dyondzisiwa hi Xibunu. Maphorisa ma sivele mkhuva kutani ma pfula ku hlaselisa. Exikarhi ka vo sungula ku dlayiwa a ku ri **Hector Pieterson** wa malembe ya 12, loyi xifaniso xa yena xi hlamarise misava hinkwayo.

items: Mkhuva wu hleriwe ngopfu-ngopfu hi swichudeni hi swoxe.
Ku pfukela ku hangalake ku suka eSoweto ku ya eka madorobo etikweni hinkwaro ra Afrika Dzonga.
Vanhu va madzana yo tala, vo tala va ha ri vantshwa, va dlayiwile hi tinhweti leti landzeleke.

media.alt: Nchumu wa lava fambaka lava khomeke placard, va famba hi vun'we mahlweni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='24' width='96' height='34' rx='3' fill='#fff' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><text x='84' y='46' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' font-weight='bold' fill='#8a1f1f'>NO AFRIKAANS</text><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='84' r='11'/><rect x='34' y='96' width='13' height='40'/><circle cx='84' cy='80' r='11'/><rect x='78' y='92' width='13' height='44'/><circle cx='128' cy='84' r='11'/><rect x='122' y='96' width='13' height='40'/><circle cx='172' cy='80' r='11'/><rect x='166' y='92' width='13' height='44'/><circle cx='210' cy='84' r='11'/><rect x='204' y='96' width='13' height='40'/></g><rect x='30' y='140' width='190' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hector Pieterson hi ntolovelo u tsariwa a ri wa malembe ya 12 kumbe 13; xifaniso xa Sam Nzima xa miri wa yena wu rhwariwa, na Antoinette Sithole a tsutsuma ekele, xi hundzuke xikombiso xa misava hinkwayo. [SME] Tinhlayo ta ku fa hi Khotavuxika 1976 na endzhaku ti na ku kanetana - tinhlayo ta ximfumo ti nyike kwalomu ka 176, kasi minkambiso yin'wana yi fika eka 600 kumbe ku tlula; hlawula nhlayo na maendlelo lawa SME wa wena a ma pfumelaka. Kandziyisa leswaku lava a ku ri swichudeni swa xikolo swi kanetela dyondzo leyinene.

slides.title: Ha yini Soweto a ku ri nkarhi wo cinca
slides.lead: Ku pfukela ku cince nkwetlembeto naswona ku hundzule mavonelo ya misava ku lwisana na apartheid.

blocks.text: Ku pfukela ka Soweto ku kombise leswaku xitukulwana lexintshwa a xi nga ta amukela apartheid. Vantshwa vo tala va suke etikweni ku ya joyina ANC na PAC ehandle ka tiko, va tiyisa nkwetlembeto wa matlhari. Hi 1977 murhangeri wa Black Consciousness **Steve Biko** u file endzhaku ko xanisiwa ekhotsweni ka maphorisa, swi vanga ku hlundzuka ku engetela.

items: Misava yi vone swifaniso swa vana lava tshoviwaka, kutani ntshikelelo ehenhla ka Afrika Dzonga wu kula.
Nhlangano wa Matiko-xikwembu (United Nations) na matiko yo tala ma engetele **swigwevo (sanctions)** ku lwisana na apartheid.
16 Khotavuxika sweswi ku tsundzukiwa lembe rin'wana ni rin'wana eAfrika Dzonga tanihi **Siku ra Vantshwa (Youth Day)**.

slides.notes: Humesela ehandle xivangelo na vuyelo: ku pfukela ku endle xitukulwana xi va ni maqhinga yo tika, ku tiyisa mintlawa ya ehandle ka tiko, na ku hundzula mavonelo ya matiko hi ku tiyimisela. Rifu ra Biko hi Ndzhati 1977 ri hundzuke xihlanganiso xin'wana. Hlanganisa na sweswi - Siku ra Vantshwa (16 Khotavuxika) i holideyi ya mfumo, kutani matimu lawa i xiphemu xa khalendara ya swichudeni, ku fana na Siku ra Vavasati eka yunithi leyi hundzeke.

slides.title: Ku suka eSharpeville ku ya eku fumeni ka vanhu, 1960-1994

blocks.alt: Nkarhi-llayini wa swiendlakalo swa nkoka ku suka hi 1960 ku ya eka 1994.

events.label: Ku dlaya ka Sharpeville; ANC na PAC ya yirisiwa
Mandela u gweviwa khotso ya vutomi eka Ntengiso wa Rivonia
Ku pfukela ka Soweto ku sungula hi 16 Khotavuxika
Ku vumbiwa ka United Democratic Front (UDF)
ANC na PAC ya susiwa eku yirisiweni; Mandela wa ntshunxiwa
Nhlawulo wo sungula wa ku fumiwa hi vanhu hi 27 Dzivamisoko

slides.notes: Tirhisa xikirini lexi ku hlanganisa yunithi hinkwayo emahlweni ka xiphemu xo hetelela. Vutisa swichudeni ku vona nkarhi wo leha exikarhi ka ku khomiwa ka Mandela (1964) na ku ntshunxiwa (1990) - malembe ya 26 - na ku hlanganisa ku kula ka ku kaneta ka va-1980 (UDF, mkhuva wa vanhu vo tala, swiyimo swa xihatla-hatla) na xiboho xa mfumo xo hetelela xo bulisana.

slides.title: Apartheid ehansi ka ntshikelelo
slides.lead: Hi makumu ya va-1980 mfumo a wu nga ha koti ku lawula tiko ku fana na khale.

blocks.text: Hi 1983 mintlawa yo tala yi hlangane eka **United Democratic Front (UDF)** ku kaneta apartheid endzeni ka tiko. Mikhuva, tistrayiki na tiboycott swi endle swifundzha swo tala swi va 'leswi nga fumekiki', kutani mfumo wu tivise swiyimo swa xihatla-hatla hi ku phindha-phindha.

items: **Swigwevo (sanctions)** swa matiko swi onhile ikhonomi na ku hlawulela Afrika Dzonga.
Ku huwelela ka 'Ntshunxani Nelson Mandela' ku kule ngopfu ekaya na ehandle ka tiko.
Hi 1989 **F.W. de Klerk** u ve Presidente wa Rifumo, a tiyimiserile ku bulisana.

media.alt: Xibakele lexi khomekeke xi tlakuka ehenhla ka ntshungu, xi fanekisela ku kaneta ka vanhu vo tala.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='96' y='40' width='28' height='44' rx='6'/><rect x='92' y='34' width='8' height='16' rx='3'/><rect x='102' y='30' width='8' height='20' rx='3'/><rect x='112' y='32' width='8' height='18' rx='3'/><rect x='122' y='36' width='8' height='14' rx='3'/><rect x='100' y='82' width='20' height='30'/></g><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='120' r='9'/><circle cx='70' cy='116' r='9'/><circle cx='150' cy='116' r='9'/><circle cx='180' cy='120' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='134' width='172' height='10' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela mimpimo yo tala leyi susumetaka mfumo ku ya etafuleni: ku kaneta ka vanhu vo tala endzeni ka tiko (UDF na tivandla ta vatirhi), ku onhaka ka ikhonomi hi swigwevo na ku susiwa ka mabindzu, na ku cinca ka xiyimo xa misava loko Cold War yi hela. De Klerk, a va presidente hi 1989, u vone leswaku ku antswisa na ku bulisana sweswi a swi ri ndlela ntsena leyi nga twisisekaka. Leswi swi veka swiendlakalo swo hlamarisa swa 1990.

slides.eyebrow: Nkarhi wo cinca wa vunharhu - Nyenyenyani 1990
slides.title: Ku susiwa ka ku yirisiwa na ku ntshunxiwa ka Mandela
slides.lead: Hi 2 Nyenyenyani 1990 mfumo wu suse ku yirisiwa; masiku ya kaye endzhaku Mandela u fambe a ntshunxekile.

blocks.text: Ndza mi losa hinkwenu hi vito ra ku rhula, ku fuma ka vanhu na ntshunxeko wa hinkwavo.

Eka nkulumo eka palamende hi **2 Nyenyenyani 1990**, Presidente wa Rifumo **F.W. de Klerk** u suse ku yirisiwa ka ANC, PAC na mintlawa yin'wana kutani a ntshunxa vabohiwa va tipolitiki. Hi **11 Nyenyenyani 1990**, endzhaku ka malembe ya 27 ekhotsweni, **Nelson Mandela** u ntshunxiwile.

items: Varhangeri lava a va suke etikweni va kote ku vuya naswona mintlawa yi kota ku tirha erivaleni nakambe.
Mandela u vitanele ku rhula na tinkulumo to aka Afrika Dzonga leyi fumiwaka hi vanhu.
Ndlela yi pfulekile sweswi ya tinkulumo to hetelela apartheid.

slides.notes: Lowu i nkarhi wo cinca wa vunharhu na xiyimo xa le henhla xa mintlhaveko ya yunithi. Nkulumo ya de Klerk ya 2 Nyenyenyani hi ntolovelo yi vuriwa nkarhi lowu apartheid yi sunguleke ku hela. Mandela u ntshunxiwile hi 11 Nyenyenyani kutani a vulavula nimadyambu a ri ebalcony ya Cape Town City Hall eka ntshungu lowukulu. [SME] Tiyisisa marito ya xiyeni ya nkulumo yin'wana na yin'wana ya Mandela na xihlovo xa SAHO u nga si kandziyisa. Kandziyisa leswaku ku ntshunxiwa a swi vulanga ntshunxeko wa hinkwavo se - tinkulumo a ti ha ri emahlweni.

slides.eyebrow: Ndlela yo ya eku fumeni ka vanhu - 1990 ku ya 1993
slides.title: Ku bulisana hi Afrika Dzonga leyintshwa
slides.lead: Valala va khale a va fanele ku vulavula, hambiloko ku ri ni ku pfumala ku tshemba ni madzolonga lawa ma hambeteke.

blocks.text: Ku sukela emakumu ya 1991 mfumo, ANC na mavandla man'wana va hlangane eka **Convention for a Democratic South Africa (CODESA)** ku kunguhata tiko lerintshwa leri nga riki na xihlawuhlawu xa muxaka. Tinkulumo a ti tikile naswona ti tshikeleriwe hi madzolonga ya tipolitiki, kambe ti hambete.

items: Eka **referendum ya vavbasi ntsena ya 1992**, vahlawuri va vavasi va seketele ku hambeta ka tinkulumo.
Tinkulumo ta mavandla yo tala ti pfumelelane hi **vumbiwa bya nkarhinyana (interim constitution)** na siku ra nhlawulo.
Un'wana ni un'wana wa malembe yo tlula 18, wa muxaka wun'wana ni wun'wana, a ta kota ku vhota ro sungula.

media.alt: Mavoko mambirhi ya matlhelo yo hambana ma fikelelana ku khomana ehenhla ka tafula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='96' width='180' height='10' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='40' y='106' width='8' height='34' fill='#5c4326'/><rect x='192' y='106' width='8' height='34' fill='#5c4326'/><path d='M60 78 q30 -6 58 6' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M180 78 q-30 -6 -58 6' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='120' cy='84' r='12' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku ku bulisana a swi vula ku boha - ku hava tlhelo leri kumeke hinkwaswo leswi ri swi lavaka. CODESA I yi hlangane hi Nhlangula 1991; CODESA II yi yime hi 1992, kutani mkhuva wu tsandzeka ku hela hi madzolonga, kambe tinkulumo ta mavandla yo tala ti tlhele ti sungula kutani ti humesa vumbiwa bya nkarhinyana hi 1993. Referendum ya 1992 yi vutise vahlawuri va vavasi loko ku antswisa ku fanele ku hambeta; kwalomu ka mantwo-thirds va vhote ina. Kandziyisa leswaku a swi hlamarisa ku fikelela nhlahluvo wo rhula.

slides.eyebrow: Ku fuma ka vanhu emakumu - 27 Dzivamisoko 1994
slides.title: Nhlawulo wo sungula wa ku fumiwa hi vanhu
slides.lead: Ro sungula, Vaafrika Dzonga hinkwavo va kote ku vhota - kutani va hlawula ntshunxeko.

blocks.text: Hi **27 Dzivamisoko 1994**, magidi ya Vaafrika Dzonga va mixaka hinkwayo va vhote eka nhlawulo wo sungula wa ku fumiwa hi vanhu wa tiko. Vanhu va yime emiraveni yo leha ya ku lehisela mbilu, vo tala va vhota ro sungula evutomini bya vona. ANC yi hlurile, kutani **Nelson Mandela** u ve presidente wo sungula wa Afrika Dzonga loyi a hlawuriweke hi vanhu.

items: 27 Dzivamisoko sweswi ku tlangeriwa lembe rin'wana ni rin'wana tanihi **Siku ra Ntshunxeko (Freedom Day)**.
Vumbiwa lebyintshwa hi 1996 byi tiyisise timfanelo to ringana eka un'wana ni un'wana.
Minkarhi yo cinca ya 1960, 1976 na 1990 yi fikise, emakumu, eku fumeni ka vanhu.

media.alt: Voko leri rhurhelaka phepha ra ku vhota ebokisini emahlweni ka dyambu leri tlhandlukaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='30' fill='#e8a13a'/><g stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='4'><line x1='110' y1='8' x2='110' y2='20'/><line x1='60' y1='58' x2='72' y2='58'/><line x1='148' y1='58' x2='160' y2='58'/></g><rect x='70' y='92' width='80' height='56' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='84' y='82' width='52' height='14' rx='2' fill='#1f3a24'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='28' height='34' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-10 110 75)'/><path d='M104 74 l6 6 l12 -14' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hetisisa ntsheketo wa matimu hi ndlela ya ntshembo kambe leyi tiyisaka. Nhlawulo wa 27 Dzivamisoko 1994 (Siku ra Ntshunxeko) wu herisile mfumo wa apartheid; Mandela u vekiwile a va presidente hi 10 Mudyaxihi 1994. Tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku ku fuma ka vanhu a ku ri ku sungula, ku nga ri makumu - Vumbiwa bya 1996 byi vekile timfanelo leti Vaafrika Dzonga va ha tirhelaka ku ti sirhelela namuntlha. Kutani suka u ya eka swivutiso swo kambela.

slides.title: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke - na swivutiso swo hlamula
slides.lead: Minkarhi yinharhu yo cinca - 1960, 1976 na 1990 - yi susumetile Afrika Dzonga ku suka eka apartheid ku ya eku fumeni ka vanhu.

blocks.text: Sharpeville (1960) yi paluxile madzolonga ya apartheid kutani yi fikisa eku yirisiweni ka ANC na PAC. Soweto (1976) yi tise xitukulwana lexintshwa eku lweleni kutani yi hundzula mavonelo ya misava ku lwisana na apartheid. Ku susiwa ka ku yirisiwa na ku ntshunxiwa ka Mandela (1990) ku pfule ndlela ya tinkulumo kutani, hi 1994, ya ku fuma ka vanhu.

blocks.question: Ha yini ku dlaya ka Sharpeville ka 1960 ku hlamuseriwa tanihi nkarhi wo cinca ematimwini ya Afrika Dzonga?
Hlamusela leswi vangeke ku pfukela ka Soweto ka 1976 kutani u nyika vuyelo bya kona byimbirhi.
Hlamusela swiendlakalo swimbirhi exikarhi ka 1990 na 1994 leswi pfuneke Afrika Dzonga ku va tiko ra ku fumiwa hi vanhu.

slides.notes: Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsala kumbe mbulavurisano wa ntlawa; ku aviwa ka mineku ku fanisa maendlelo ya CAPS ya ku tsala ku sekeriwe eka xihlovo na ku tsala loku andziseke. Khutaza swichudeni ku tirhisa xikirini xa nkarhi-layini loko va kunguhata tinhlamulo ta vona. Tanihi ku anakanyisisa ko hetelela, vutisa leswaku ha yini swi ri swa nkoka leswaku Siku ra Vantshwa na Siku ra Ntshunxeko ma ha ri tiholideyi ta mfumo namuntlha.
